basics.name: Qiong LIU
basics.label: Maîtresse de conférences (Assistant Professor)
basics.summary: Maîtresse de conférences at Sorbonne Université – LIP6. My research focuses on AI for Networked Systems, Softwarized Infrastructures (NFV, SDN, MLOps), and Stochastic Modeling.

work.name: Sorbonne Université – LIP6 (NPA team)
work.summary: Operationalizing AI in high-speed softwarized networks; Stochastic geometry-based modeling for NGMA cellular networks.

work.name: ETIS UMR 8051, CY Cergy Paris University
work.summary: Research themes initiated during this period on AI applied to software networks.

work.name: Télécom Paris
work.summary: Applied AI/ML for high-speed softwarized networks and Cybersecurity.
highlights: Best Paper Runner-up Award at IEEE NetSoft 2024

volunteer.summary: Contributing to the peer-review process for leading journals and conferences in networking and communications.
highlights: Journals: IEEE Communications Magazine, IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications, ACM TOMPECS
Conferences: IEEE INFOCOM 2025, IEEE ICC 2024/2025, IEEE Globecom 2023, IEEE SmartGridComm 2024

education.summary: Thesis: Performance Analysis of Dynamic Downlink Cellular Networks

projects.name: IONOS-DX
projects.summary: Participant of the ANR funding project focused on software networks.

projects.name: Beyond 5G (B5G) Project
projects.summary: Supported by the Digital Infrastructure Strategic Sector Committee. Researching next-generation cellular architectures and AI-driven network management.
